stop_reason: Slash-number prerelease rows normalize onto occupied BW promo collector slots before founder approval or staging, so the bounded batch cannot lawfully advance as a whole.

canonical_verification_summary.mapping_image_follow_up_status: No mapping or image writer ran in this pass; follow-up remains post-promotion work.

lessons_learned: The stamped bridge path is sound for bounded source-backed intake: all 25 rows bridged cleanly into RAW with deterministic stamped variant payloads.

The current warehouse identity slot model collapses slash-number stamped promos onto occupied BW promo collector slots because number_plain strips the right-hand total and collides with existing BWxx base rows.

Base proof was present for every batch row, but several underlying base rows still carry blank-string variant_key values instead of NULL; that drift should be corrected in the base repair pass before widening the backlog.
Because the stop condition fired during classification dry-run, no founder approval, staging, executor dry-run, or canon write was lawful in this batch pass.
